# Gotcha2
<!-- Auto-generated by /c-setup-l -->

Trimmed-down rewrite of the Gotcha kill-game backend (ASP.NET Core API + EF Core + Identity).

## Getting Started

### Prerequisites
- .NET 10 SDK
- SQL Server Express (`.\SQLEXPRESS`) — used for the `Gotcha2.Db` database
- `dotnet-ef` global tool (`dotnet tool install --global dotnet-ef`)

### Installation
```bash
dotnet restore Gotcha2.slnx
dotnet build Gotcha2.slnx --nologo -v q
dotnet ef database update -p Gotcha2.Core -s Gotcha2.API
```

### Running
```bash
dotnet run --project Gotcha2.API
```
Default URLs: `http://localhost:5132`, `https://localhost:7278`.

## Project Structure
| Project       |             Path             |        Role        |
|:-------------:|:----------------------------:|:------------------:|
| Gotcha2.API   | `Gotcha2.API/`               | ASP.NET Core Web API host (controllers, OpenAPI, DbContext registration). |
| Gotcha2.Core  | `Gotcha2.Core/`              | Entities, EF Core DbContext, migrations, repository contracts. |

Per-subproject guides: see `Gotcha2.API/CLAUDE-API.md` and `Gotcha2.Core/CLAUDE-CORE.md`.

## Tech Stack
- **Runtime**: .NET 10
- **API**: ASP.NET Core (`Microsoft.NET.Sdk.Web`) + OpenAPI
- **Data**: EF Core 10 + SQL Server (Express)
- **Auth**: ASP.NET Core Identity (`IdentityUser<Guid>`, `IdentityRole<Guid>`)
